3dkaarkhana

Professional 3D printing and rapid prototyping services for startups, engineering, and creative projects.

  • Home
  • About
  • Services
  • Contact

3D Printing Services

  • FDM prototyping (PLA, PETG, ABS, TPU)
  • SLA high-resolution parts (standard and engineering resins)
  • SLS functional parts (Nylon PA12, Glass-filled, Carbon-filled)
  • Flexible and tough elastomeric components

Prototyping Solutions

  • Rapid proof-of-concept prototypes
  • Functional testing models and fit checks
  • Assembly-ready precision components
  • End-use part production for low-volume runs

Add-on Services

  • CAD design review and manufacturability optimization
  • Surface finishing, post-processing, painting, and assembly
  • Design for additive manufacturing (DfAM) consulting

Ready to get started? Contact us at 3dstuff.contact@gmail.com or use the email link in the header.
